problem: Why do all animals sleep — what is the essential biological function?
hypothesis: If Sleep-dependent memory consolidation in hippocampus is applied to essential, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Human TMS-EEG study with 26 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Real knowledge is to know the extent of one's ignorance. — Confucius
